race.comment: FIRERATED (1) progressed nicely last time out to finish just 0.8 lengths from the winner in third over 1200m at Pakenham Synthetic. Ready to win fourth up and should be able to improve again in a winnable race. PALAZZO DAMA (6) showed little early speed last start and failed to come on in the straight when 12th, beaten 13 lengths, over 1000m at Caulfield. This is a fair bit easier having won her maiden well enough prior. Can bounce back. SCHOLL DEEP (7) has been out of the placings in two runs since a break, the latest when fourth, beaten 4 lengths, over 1400m at Hamilton after she was prominent at the bend. Ready to fire now and should take catching off a freshen. RACETOTHEBOTTOM (4) returns after a spell of 11 months. He showed ability last time in and draws low, expect the yard to have him ready to go.
